intro: Spin the reels and win multiple payouts and a legendary jackpot.
description:
Pull the lever and test your luck in Fruits Slot Machine — a simple, fast-paced slot machine game right in your console.
Choose your bet, spin the reels, and match the symbols to win. Land three of a kind for big payouts, or hit the rarest combination of all to claim the ultimate jackpot. Every spin could change everything.

Features:
-Minimum bet of $500 — high stakes only
-5 fruit symbols with different payout multipliers
-Auto-spin mode to keep the reels rolling hands-free
-Triple matches pay up to 10× your bet
-Land the secret rare combo for the JACKPOT
